step.name: map-route-tree
step.action: Plan app/ structure: route groups, parallel routes, intercepting routes. Mark public vs auth-required segments.

step.name: build-server-components
step.action: Implement page.tsx + layout.tsx as server components. Fetch data colocated.

step.name: isolate-client-boundaries
step.action: Identify components needing hooks or events. Add 'use client' at the smallest leaf. Pass props down from server.

step.name: author-server-actions
step.action: Define 'use server' actions per mutation. Add validation (zod/yup). Call revalidatePath/Tag on success.
step.decision-gate: If a mutation needs streaming response or fine-grained progress, fall back to API route + RSC streaming.

step.name: declare-caching
step.action: Annotate each fetch with revalidate + tags. Document the strategy per segment in ADR.
